overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a waterfront promenade in a medieval fantasy city. The character transitions from a narrow path by the water, ascends a stone ramp to an upper terrace, and continues through cobblestone streets lined with historic buildings and NPCs under an overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow waterfront walkway with stone retaining wall

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the narrow waterfront path beside the stone sea wall

entered.detail: tall weathered stone wall forming the edge of the upper city structure
long wooden pier extending into the water with multiple moored boats
small wooden fishing boats tied to the dock pillars
decorative stone posts with rope railings along the water edge
large mountain visible across the water shrouded in atmospheric haze

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cobblestone walkway squeezed between a towering stone wall on the left and a waterfront on the right. Wooden boats are moored at a dock extending into the misty water, with mountains visible in the hazy distance. The path is empty of people, creating a solitary atmosphere as the character walks forward.

scene_state.functional_zone: widening waterfront promenade approaching stone staircase

events.description: path widens and begins curving left toward stone ramp and staircase

agents.ego_description: continuing along the waterfront as the path opens up and approaches the stairs

entered.detail: wide stone stairs and ramp leading up to the upper city level
tall ornate metal lamp posts with hanging lanterns
strings of decorative flags stretched across the path ahead

segments.scene_description: The waterfront path gradually widens as the character approaches a stone staircase leading upward. Decorative lantern posts and festival bunting become visible ahead, while the dock and boats recede behind. The stone wall remains on the left but at a greater distance as the space opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined upper terrace with stone balustrade

events.description: character begins ascending the stone ramp toward upper city level
entering area with pedestrian NPCs and overhead tree canopy

agents.ego_description: walking up the stone ramp toward the upper city level, passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow pants walking down the ramp toward the water
woman in blue dress standing by the stone balustrade looking at the water

entered.detail: sloped stone walkway with low walls leading upward
ornate stone railing overlooking the water below
tall slender trees providing partial canopy over the path
building with red facade visible through the trees

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stone ramp to the upper terrace level, passing under cypress trees and alongside a stone balustrade. Other pedestrians appear, walking in the opposite direction or standing by the railing. The environment shifts from open waterfront to a more enclosed tree-lined walkway with buildings visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: cobblestone street with colorful historic townhouses

events.description: turning from terrace onto cobblestone street lined with stone buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the cobblestone street passing colorful buildings and flower beds

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow pants walking along the street

entered.detail: three-story building with distinctive blue painted facade and white trim
large stone manor house with tall windows and ornate doorway
lush red flowering bushes in planters along the building front
black iron lamp post with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: Leaving the tree-lined terrace, the character enters a cobblestone street lined with historic buildings. A distinctive blue townhouse stands on the left while a grey stone manor with red flower beds occupies the right. The street is sparsely populated with pedestrians, and ornate street lamps line the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open cobblestone street with distant city views

events.description: emerging into more open area with brighter sky and improved visibility of distant architecture

agents.ego_description: continuing through the historic district with expansive views of distant castle spires

notable_agents.action: seated figure resting against the building wall

entered.detail: large castle complex with multiple spires visible on the horizon
bushes with purple blooms lining the street edge
elaborately carved stone entrance with columns

segments.scene_description: The street opens up to reveal expansive views of a distant castle complex on the horizon. The character passes purple flower bushes and ornate doorways while the grey stone building recedes to the right. The sky becomes more visible, brightening the scene as the path continues through the historic district.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a solitary, misty waterfront walkway that gradually ascends and opens into a bustling historic city district. It begins on a narrow cobblestone path squeezed between a towering stone wall and a dock with moored boats, moving forward as the hazy mountains recede into the distance. As the path widens, the camera approaches a stone staircase adorned with festival bunting and lanterns, ascending a ramp past cypress trees and pedestrians toward an upper terrace. The scene then shifts from the open waterfront to a more enclosed street lined with historic architecture, passing a blue townhouse and a grey stone manor with red flower beds. Finally, the environment expands as the character moves past purple flower bushes and ornate doorways, revealing an expansive view of a distant castle complex under a brightening sky.
